reviews.review_description: I drive the garbage truck in I put in all the garbage, but it doesn’t tell me what to do next after I put the bins back and that’s why I give it one star
If you get motion sickness, there is no ability to change anything. There are no settings at all. It has to be the game with the most glitches I've seen, by far.

reviews.review_title: Life skills to pay the bills !
reviews.review_description: I got promoted to owner of the doggie dookie collector truck on my first day! I am a real garbage man, in real life and this is 100% accurate sim.

Dev, sitting in driver seat seems too hi , there's no traffic, some garbage flys out of the garage can when walking with it, part of sidewalk missing, but I hope you already knew that , I'm looking forward to more updates.
Great experience of truck driving and I loved the levels in which we pick garbage by stick.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. Please stay tuned for further updates.
